subcodes.first_line: How sweet is the remembrance of him who hath turned unto the Kaaba of My beauty and hath quaffed the wine of reunion from the hands of My bounty and hath attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ما احلی ذکری من اقبل الی کعبه جمالی و شرب خمر وصالی من ایادی عطائی و فاز
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @spiritual transformation
